name: ejentum-genkit
description: Genkit (Google) integration for the Ejentum Reasoning Harness. createEjentumTools(ai) returns eight agent-callable tools as an array: four dynamic (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory) plus four adaptive (adaptive-reasoning, adaptive-code, adaptive-anti-deception, adaptive-memory) that pre-fit the operation to your task via an adapter LLM. Each call returns a structured cognitive injection: a natural-language procedure plus an executable reasoning topology.
author: Ejentum <info@ejentum.com>
